field.name: country_id
field.label: COM_J2COMMERCE_FIELD_COUNTRY
field.query: SELECT j2commerce_country_id AS value, country_name AS text FROM #__j2commerce_countries WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY country_name

field.name: zone_id
field.label: COM_J2COMMERCE_FIELD_ZONE
field.query: SELECT j2commerce_zone_id AS value, CONCAT(zone_name, ' (', (SELECT country_isocode_2 FROM #__j2commerce_countries WHERE j2commerce_country_id = #__j2commerce_zones.country_id), ')') AS text FROM #__j2commerce_zones WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY zone_name
